charger_red_light.action_message: Screenshot the app if available and send to after-sales team.
charger_red_light.required_proof_next: App screenshot or charger app error page if available.

charger_blinking_red_light.action_message: Please provide the app error log or red-light flash count.
charger_blinking_red_light.required_proof_next: App error log screenshot or red-light flash count.

charger_no_light.action_message: Please check whether the breaker in the EVDB has tripped.
charger_no_light.required_proof_next: Photo of EVDB breaker state if the charger remains off.

charger_serial_brand_visible.action_message: Charger identity captured. Continue troubleshooting with fault evidence if needed.

evdb_single_phase.action_message: Single-phase EVDB detected. Verify RCCB 40A Type A 2P and MCB 40A 2P are present.
evdb_single_phase.required_proof_next: Clear close-up of RCCB and MCB labels.

evdb_three_phase.action_message: Three-phase EVDB detected. Verify MCB 40A 4P and RCCB 40A Type A 4P are present.
evdb_three_phase.required_proof_next: Clear close-up of RCCB and MCB labels.

mcb_tripped.action_message: MCB/RCCB appears tripped. Please check or reset only if safe, and escalate if it trips repeatedly.
mcb_tripped.required_proof_next: Photo showing breaker state after reset attempt.

missing_mcb_rccb.action_message: Contact after-sales team to repair or replace missing breakers.
missing_mcb_rccb.required_proof_next: Clear photo of the full EVDB.

wrong_component_specs.action_message: Contact after-sales team to repair or replace incorrectly specified breakers.
wrong_component_specs.required_proof_next: Clear photo of RCCB/MCB ratings and type labels.

isolator_on.action_message: Isolator appears ON. Continue checking charger indicator and EVDB breaker state.
isolator_on.required_proof_next: Photo of charger indicator and EVDB breaker state.

isolator_off_open_circuit.action_message: Please turn ON the isolator and check whether the breaker in the EVDB has tripped.
isolator_off_open_circuit.required_proof_next: Photo after turning isolator ON if the charger still has no power.

unknown.action_message: Unable to confirm the Theme 2 observation. Please retake a clear photo of the charger, EVDB, or isolator.
unknown.required_proof_next: Clear photo of the relevant charger, EVDB, or isolator evidence.

red_light_flashes_6.action_message: Contact after-sales team for installation issue review.
red_light_flashes_6.required_proof_next: App error log screenshot or video showing six red flashes.

red_light_flashes_7.action_message: Please release the emergency stop button and retry the charger.
red_light_flashes_7.required_proof_next: Photo confirming the emergency stop button is released.

red_light_flashes_8.action_message: Contact after-sales team for charger short-circuit review.
red_light_flashes_8.required_proof_next: App error log screenshot or video showing eight red flashes.

red_light_flashes_9.action_message: Please shut down the charger for a while, then restart the charger.
red_light_flashes_9.required_proof_next: Photo or app screenshot after the restart attempt.
